pages.title: Cricket's Global Obsession: Sport as Cultural Identity and Economic Power | Everything in Perspective | Everything in Perspective
pages.description: Why 3 billion people follow cricket—not as sport, but as cultural identity. How cricket became the largest sport by audience, revenue, and geopolitical influence.

pages.title: Everything in Perspective | Everything in Perspective
pages.description: Essays on trends, context & nuance

pages.title: E-Commerce Giants: How Amazon and Flipkart Reshaped Retail and Labor | Everything in Perspective | Everything in Perspective
pages.description: From disruption to dominance—how Amazon and Flipkart conquered retail markets, destroyed traditional merchants, and created a new underclass of gig workers.

pages.title: Gemini and the AI Landscape: Beyond ChatGPT's First-Mover Advantage | Everything in Perspective | Everything in Perspective
pages.description: ChatGPT won the public narrative. But the actual AI competition is far more nuanced—and OpenAI's dominance is fragile. What Gemini, Claude, and others are doing differently.

pages.title: Gold as Inflation Hedge: When Precious Metals Matter (And When They Don't) | Everything in Perspective | Everything in Perspective
pages.description: Why gold remains valuable in uncertain economies—not as get-rich-quick, but as inflation protection. Historical data, current context, and when to actually buy.

pages.title: Google Maps: How Location Data Reshapes Urban Planning, Privacy, and Power | Everything in Perspective | Everything in Perspective
pages.description: Google Maps promised directions. It delivered unprecedented surveillance of human movement. What location data reveals—and who has access to it.

pages.title: Restaurant Culture Post-Pandemic: Community, Economics, and the Future of Dining | Everything in Perspective | Everything in Perspective
pages.description: How restaurants transformed during pandemic lockdowns and what the post-2024 landscape reveals about urban community, labor, and local economics.

pages.title: Instagram and Mental Health: The Hidden Cost of Connection | Everything in Perspective | Everything in Perspective
pages.description: Instagram promised connection. Instead, it delivered comparison, anxiety, and algorithmic manipulation. What research actually shows—and what the platform doesn't want you to know.

pages.title: Why Satta King Traps Millions: The Economics of Desperation | Everything in Perspective | Everything in Perspective
pages.description: Understanding satta king's hold on millions—not as vice, but as rational choice under economic pressure. The systemic failures that make illegal gambling the only escape.

pages.title: Streaming Wars: How Entertainment Distribution Reshapes Culture and Labor | Everything in Perspective | Everything in Perspective
pages.description: From Netflix disruption to streaming saturation—how on-demand video changed entertainment economics, collapsed piracy, and created an unsustainable content arms race.

pages.title: Translation and Globalization: How Breaking Language Barriers Reshapes Power | Everything in Perspective | Everything in Perspective
pages.description: From human translators to AI translation—how breaking language barriers reshapes economies, culture, and global power structures. What's gained, what's lost.

pages.title: The Weather Crisis: Climate Data You Need to Know (And Why You Don't) | Everything in Perspective | Everything in Perspective
pages.description: Climate change isn't a future threat—it's reshaping weather today. The data everyone ignores and why climate literacy matters more than carbon reduction rhetoric.
